title: tracing::warn for unrecognised SpaceRole: observability without behavior change
description: The SpaceRole::parse fallback to Member is intentional (keeps the DB valid), but without the warn\! the mismatch between relay's role string and local storage is invisible. Adding a structured log (role=?, space_id, contact_id) with the original string lets an operator grep logs to detect relay/client version skew without changing any behavior or adding complexity. A future contributor might suggest making the fallback an error — resist this; the relay may add new roles we don't know yet, and the safe degradation to Member is correct behavior.
close_reason: Decision records — no code change needed; recorded for future reference
